eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Cass, ND; at 04:50 PM ON MAR 31, 2026 Effective until 05:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A Silver Alert is being issued by NDHP and ND BCI at the request of Fargo Police Department. Larry George of Fargo, ND is a 65 year old Black Male.  
He is 5 feet 11 inches tall, weighs 155 pounds and has black/gray hair and Brown eyes.  
His last known whereabouts were on March 31, 2026 at 10:30am in the 1100 block of 23rd St. S in Fargo, North Dakota.

Larry is a vulnerable adult. Last seen wearing gray pants and a black t-shirt. 

If you have any information regarding this incident, please contact Fargo Police Department at 701-235-4493.

The above Silver Alert information is available to the public by calling 5 1 1 and at www.ndresponse.gov/alert
